name: Mrs. Neeta Parmar
bio: Founded Kids Planet in 2010 with a vision to provide quality education in Kullu Valley. Leads the school with dedication and passion for nurturing young minds.

name: Mrs. Sunita Sharma
bio: Oversees academic planning and curriculum development for primary and middle school sections.

name: Mrs. Anita Thakur
bio: Specializes in early childhood education with a focus on play-based learning and creative development.

name: Mr. Rajesh Kumar
bio: Makes complex concepts accessible through hands-on experiments and real-world applications.

name: Mrs. Priya Verma
bio: Encourages creative writing and critical thinking among students through interactive teaching methods.

name: Mrs. Meena Devi
bio: Passionate about preserving Indian languages and culture while making learning engaging for students.

name: Mr. Vikram Singh
bio: Trains students in various sports and ensures physical fitness through structured activity programs.

name: Mrs. Kavita Rana
bio: Nurtures creativity and artistic expression in students through painting, craft, and performing arts.
